content: Hey, I'm Rowan, nice to meet you. I've been driving trucks for over 20 years and I'm always looking for ways to improve my route planning and navigation.
Nice to meet you too, Rowan. What kind of technology are you currently using for route planning?
I'm using a Garmin GPS device, but I've been thinking of switching to a smartphone app. I've heard good things about some of the newer apps.
Smartphone apps can be very convenient. Some popular options include Waze and Google Maps. Have you considered any specific features you'd like to have in a route planning app?
I'd like to have real-time traffic updates and the ability to customize my routes. I've also been getting into speedcubing in my free time, it's a great way to relax.
Speedcubing is a unique hobby. Real-time traffic updates and customizable routes are definitely features you can find in some of the newer apps. What's your favorite part about speedcubing?
I love the challenge of trying to solve the cube as quickly as possible. I've also been enjoying gardening and beekeeping, they're great ways to unwind after a long drive.
Gardening and beekeeping are great hobbies. They can be very therapeutic. Are you planning on competing in any speedcubing competitions or is it just a hobby for you?
I'm not sure yet, I've been thinking about it but I need to improve my times first. I've got a big event coming up on November 1st, a triathlon, and I need to make sure I'm in top shape.
A triathlon is a big undertaking, good luck with your training. Have you been using any specific tech tools to help you prepare, such as a fitness tracker or running app?
I've been using a Fitbit to track my progress, it's been really helpful. I've also been trying to eat healthier, I've been cooking a lot of Japanese cuisine at home.
Japanese food is delicious and can be very healthy. What's your favorite Japanese dish to cook?
Well, it was great chatting with you, Rowan. If you have any more questions or need further recommendations, don't hesitate to reach out.
